meta.title: About ClawGuru - AI Agent Security Platform | Product Overview
meta.description: Discover ClawGuru's comprehensive AI agent security platform. Learn about our mission, technology, and how we protect AI infrastructure with enterprise-grade security solutions.

hero.title: Securing the Future of AI
hero.subtitle: ClawGuru is the leading AI agent security platform, protecting the infrastructure that powers tomorrow's intelligent systems
hero.description: We believe AI agents deserve the same security standards as critical infrastructure. Our platform provides comprehensive protection for AI systems, from individual agents to large-scale deployments.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Democratizing AI Security
mission.content: ClawGuru was founded with a simple mission: to make enterprise-grade AI security accessible to everyone. We believe that as AI becomes more critical to business operations, security must evolve to protect these intelligent systems.

pillars.title: Security First
pillars.description: Every decision we make prioritizes the security and protection of AI systems and their data.

pillars.title: Accessibility
pillars.description: Advanced security should be available to organizations of all sizes, not just large enterprises.

pillars.title: Global Impact
pillars.description: AI security is a global challenge that requires collaborative solutions and shared intelligence.

pillars.title: Innovation
pillars.description: We continuously push the boundaries of what's possible in AI security technology.

timeline.title: The Challenge Identified
timeline.description: Our founders discovered a critical gap in AI security while working with large enterprises. AI agents were being deployed without proper security measures, exposing organizations to significant risks.

timeline.title: ClawGuru Founded
timeline.description: We assembled a team of security experts, AI specialists, and enterprise architects to build the first comprehensive AI agent security platform.

timeline.title: Platform Launch
timeline.description: Launched our initial platform with core security assessment, runbook generation, and basic threat detection capabilities.

timeline.title: Rapid Growth
timeline.description: Expanded to serve thousands of customers, introduced Oracle AI intelligence, and reached 4.2 million generated security runbooks.

timeline.title: Market Leadership
timeline.description: Established ourselves as the leading AI agent security platform with enterprise customers worldwide and continuous innovation.

sections.title: AI-Powered Analysis
sections.description: Our proprietary AI models analyze security patterns, predict threats, and generate intelligent responses.

sections.title: Mycelium Network
sections.description: Distributed security intelligence network that enables collaborative defense across organizations.

sections.title: Zero Trust Architecture
sections.description: Built on zero-trust principles with comprehensive authentication, authorization, and access control.

sections.title: Enterprise Integration
sections.description: Seamless integration with existing security infrastructure and enterprise systems.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Learn more about ClawGuru and our approach to AI security

questions.question: What makes ClawGuru different from other security solutions?
questions.answer: ClawGuru is specifically designed for AI agents and their unique security challenges. Unlike traditional security tools, we understand AI-specific vulnerabilities like API key exposure, model poisoning, and agent communication security. Our platform combines AI-powered analysis with the world's largest library of AI security runbooks.

questions.question: How does the Mycelium Network work?
questions.answer: The Mycelium Network is our distributed security intelligence system that allows organizations to share threat information and security insights. When one organization detects a new threat or vulnerability, that intelligence is automatically shared across the network, helping all participants stay protected against emerging threats.

questions.question: What types of AI agents does ClawGuru support?
questions.answer: ClawGuru supports all types of AI agents including language models, computer vision systems, autonomous agents, robotic systems, and custom AI applications. Our platform is technology-agnostic and can secure AI agents built with any framework or platform.

questions.question: How quickly can we get started with ClawGuru?
questions.answer: You can start with our free security assessment in 30 seconds. Full platform setup typically takes less than an hour, and most customers see value within the first day. Our team provides onboarding assistance to ensure you get the most out of the platform quickly.

questions.question: Is ClawGuru suitable for small teams?
questions.answer: Absolutely! We offer plans for organizations of all sizes, from individual developers to large enterprises. Our free tier includes essential security features, while our paid plans provide advanced capabilities for growing teams and enterprises.

questions.question: How does ClawGuru ensure data privacy and compliance?
questions.answer: We take data privacy seriously and comply with major regulations including GDPR, SOC 2, and ISO 27001. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit, and we never share your specific security information with third parties. You maintain full control over your data and can choose on-premise deployment if required.
